overview: MA Herb Business Manager is a multi-tenant, mobile-first business management tool for herbal product distributors. It provides a complete operations suite including sales with discount engine, inventory with FIFO tracking, purchase orders with stock sync, customer management with history, and a Super Admin governance layer for managing multiple business profiles.
features: Super Admin governance dashboard with profile enable/disable and usage metrics
Profile activity windows with date-based transaction restriction
Customer discount engine (percentage or fixed) applied to sales
Discount and payment tracking stored on orders for auditing
PO-to-inventory sync: receiving a PO increments stock immediately
Order editing with automatic FIFO stock adjustments
Payment mode and status tracking on every sale
Auditable who-columns on all data types (created by, updated by, timestamps)
Per-profile branding with logo and theme color
Multi-tenant data isolation with three-tier roles
